title: Tac UI
description: A design system where code breathes.

hero.title: Hero
hero.description: A design system where code breathes. Spring physics, sequential illumination, and glassmorphic depth — crafted for interfaces that feel alive.

fluidMotion.title: Fluid Motion
fluidMotion.description: Spring physics with mass and momentum. No mechanical easing — every element arrives with organic deceleration.

sequentialIllumination.title: Sequential Illumination
sequentialIllumination.description: Border glows that track and accelerate. Light sweeps across surfaces, creating depth hierarchy through motion.

glassmorphismDepth.title: Glassmorphism Depth
glassmorphismDepth.description: Translucent layers with backdrop blur create spatial depth. Elements float at different altitudes.
